name: NER → KG Linker
description: Text source fed into a named-entity recogniser, whose Turtle output is consumed by a KG linker. The final linked graph is collected by a KG sink.

name: PDF → KG
description: A PDF document is converted to Markdown, then processed in parallel by a content extractor and a metadata extractor. Both extraction branches produce Turtle triples that are collected into a knowledge graph.

name: RDF Base
description: Align source RDF with target KG

name: RDF Alt
description: Align source RDF with target KG with a tabular matching approach

name: RDF LLM
description: Align relations of source RDF with target KG using LLM

name: Json Alt
description: Link JSON objects to target KG

name: Json LLM
description: Align JSON path to target KG (ontology + sample KG)

name: Text Base
description: Use spoltight build RDF stagging Graph and apply Paris matching

name: Text Alt
description: (semi expensive) Use mini transformer to link entities and relations (label+alias)

name: Text LLM
description: Extract RDF from TEXT using LLM
